<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" type="device"><diagram name="mesh-roaming" id="mesh-roaming"><mxGraphModel dx="800" dy="500" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="760" pageHeight="480" math="0" shadow="0"><root><mxCell id="0"/><mxCell id="1" parent="0"/><mxCell id="net" value="Internet" style="ellipse;shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="55" y="20" width="120" height="70" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="nodeA" value="Node A
(mesh + AP)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="160" width="150" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="brA" value="bridge br0" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="70" y="290" width="90" height="36" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="clA" value="clients" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=13;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="70" y="390" width="90" height="36" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e_nbA" value="" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;" edge="1" parent="1" source="nodeA" target="brA"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e_bcA" value="" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;" edge="1" parent="1" source="brA" target="clA"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="nodeB" value="Node B

as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="brC" value="bridge br0" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="590" y="290" width="90" height="36" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="clC" value="clients" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=13;" vertex="1" target="brC"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e_bcC" value="" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;" edge="1" parent="1" source="brC" target="clC"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e_netA" value="" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;" edge="1" parent="1" source="net" target="nodeA"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e_meshAB" value="802.11s mesh" style="endArrow=none;startArrow=none;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#b85450;" edge="1" parent="1" source="nodeA" target="nodeB"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e_meshBC" value="802.11s mesh" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#9673a6;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;curved=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="clA" target="clC"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel></diagram></mxfile>
